title: Sight's Pink Sponges
description: This pack changes the regular & wet sponges to be pink.
body:
![Dry and wet sponges on the beach!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c3a3e87dc29372cb72a6b6eff776840129b65db.png)

This pack turns the regular & wet sponges to be pink, matching the [TikTok](https://www.tiktok.com/@minecraft/video/7483195354649922862) that the official Minecraft account posted a while ago.

Gotta say it was a big inspiration for this pack, and I hope you enjoy it!
